strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Strong TDD and software craftsmanship background with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching AI agent requirement
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the resume
Limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure; Java appears only in older roles
No clear mention of cloud platforms beyond AWS CDK or Kubernetes depth
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with well over the required 6 years, strong TDD discipline, and directly relevant current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators. Core stack alignment (TypeScript, Node.js, React) is strong, and he has touched AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, and MongoDB. Gaps around Nest.js and recent Kotlin/Java are real but learnable for someone with this breadth and craftsmanship orientation.
